paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, with a change of -3.95% from the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus in the Texas Panhandle, with sources including Environment America and NewsChannel 10 on MSN. Another headline from PR Newswire mentions the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There have been various SEC filings, including the appointment of new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 3 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread on Fermi America.
